title: Subarrays with K Different Integers
titleCn: K 个不同整数的子数组

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,1,2,3], k = 2 Output: 7 Explanation: Subarrays formed with exactly 2 different integers: [1,2], [2,1], [1,2], [2,3], [1,2,1], [2,1,2], [1,2,1,2]
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: Subarrays formed with exactly 2 different integers: [1,2], [2,1], [1,2], [2,3], [1,2,1], [2,1,2], [1,2,1,2]

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,1,3,4], k = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: Subarrays formed with exactly 3 different integers: [1,2,1,3], [2,1,3], [1,3,4].
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Subarrays formed with exactly 3 different integers: [1,2,1,3], [2,1,3], [1,3,4].
